title: Stata for Empirical Economics: A Reproducible Methods Portfolio
description: Twelve documented Stata .do scripts and two typeset handbooks (a Reference and a line-by-line Guide) covering the empirical-economics workflow: data management; OLS and robust inference; panel fixed effects, difference-in-differences, and event studies; time series; instrumental variables and 2SLS; binary-outcome models; staggered difference-in-differences (Callaway-Sant'Anna); regression discontinuity; synthetic control; and dynamic-panel GMM. Every figure, table, and number is reproducible from the scripts.
